# 🏗️ Engineering

> Core software engineering — backend, frontend, full-stack, mobile, and system architecture.

**13 agents** · [← Back to all categories](../../README.md)

<!-- This file is generated by scripts/build-index.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

| Agent | What it does | Model | Tags |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`api-designer`](api-designer.md) | Designs REST and GraphQL API contracts before implementation — resources, versioning, error shapes, pagination, and developer experience. | 🟡 sonnet | api, rest, graphql, openapi |
| [`backend-architect`](backend-architect.md) | Designs backend systems, APIs, data models, and service boundaries before code is written. | 🔴 opus | architecture, api, microservices, databases |
| [`cli-tool-builder`](cli-tool-builder.md) | Builds ergonomic command-line tools and developer CLIs with great UX, scripting support, and helpful output. | 🟡 sonnet | cli, developer-tools, ux, scripting |
| [`desktop-app-engineer`](desktop-app-engineer.md) | Builds cross-platform desktop apps with Electron or Tauri — native OS integration, packaging, code signing, and auto-updates. | 🟡 sonnet | desktop, electron, tauri, packaging |
| [`embedded-systems-engineer`](embedded-systems-engineer.md) | Writes firmware for constrained devices — RTOS and bare-metal — within strict memory, power, and timing budgets. | 🟡 sonnet | embedded, firmware, rtos, bare-metal |
| [`frontend-developer`](frontend-developer.md) | Builds production-grade UIs in React, Vue, or Angular — component architecture, state management, rendering performance, and accessibility. | 🟡 sonnet | react, vue, accessibility, performance |
| [`fullstack-engineer`](fullstack-engineer.md) | Delivers features end-to-end across frontend, backend, and database as one coherent design — UI, API, schema, and migration in a single vertical slice. | 🟡 sonnet | fullstack, api, database, frontend |
| [`graphql-architect`](graphql-architect.md) | Designs GraphQL schemas, federation, resolver performance, and the client-server contract. | 🟡 sonnet | graphql, schema-design, federation, dataloader |
| [`microservices-architect`](microservices-architect.md) | Decomposes systems into services with sound boundaries, communication, resilience, and data ownership. | 🔴 opus | microservices, distributed-systems, resilience, sagas |
| [`mobile-app-builder`](mobile-app-builder.md) | Builds native iOS/Android and cross-platform (React Native/Flutter) apps that feel right on each platform. | 🟡 sonnet | mobile, ios, android, react-native |
| [`rapid-prototyper`](rapid-prototyper.md) | Builds MVPs and proofs-of-concept fast to validate an idea before anyone invests in production. | 🟡 sonnet | mvp, prototype, poc, spike |
| [`realtime-systems-engineer`](realtime-systems-engineer.md) | Designs low-latency, concurrent, event-driven systems where timing is part of correctness. | 🔴 opus | real-time, low-latency, concurrency, event-driven |
| [`software-architect`](software-architect.md) | Owns system-wide architecture, design patterns, technology selection, and the decision records that justify them. | 🔴 opus | architecture, design-patterns, adr, system-design |
